title: Standard Library Problem Solving · Contract Workshop
summary: Add time, statistics, secure identifiers, text search, process, and logging features to the data tool. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a standard-library operations toolkit while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use date, time, datetime, timedelta, and timezone-aware values without comparing naive and aware timestamps.
Use math and statistics functions with explicit domain, empty-input, precision, and outlier assumptions.
Use random for simulation and secrets for security-sensitive tokens while controlling reproducibility where appropriate.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
